actors.name: Javier Milei
actors.blurb: Milei continues to dominate news cycles with his economic policies and controversial statements. His government's recent actions, including the privatization of state-owned enterprises and allegations of a coup attempt, have kept him in the spotlight. Judicial investigations into his administration and declining approval ratings are central to current coverage.

actors.name: Donald Trump

actors.name: Nigel Farage
actors.blurb: Farage continues to drive coverage of Reform UK's political activities, particularly in the wake of recent local election successes. His controversial statements, property purchase linked to a crypto billionaire, and the party's stance on immigration and economic policies keep him in the news.
